channel.title: Posts on Blog | gardlt.io
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Blog | gardlt.io

item.title: About Gardlt
item.description: Me Hello I am Alex aka gardlt, potato-engineer, potato-traveler. I have been a software engineer/DevOps for 5+ years dealing moslty with cloud technolgies. Previously worked at AT&T on their Cloud Effort using the Open-Source tool Openstack. Currently working at MasterCard for Retail Innovation Efforts, driving their K8s effort on the Azure. I purpose of this blog will be do explore new things, and creating side projects for the fun of it.
